'''Sanl'jek''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small quadrupeds that were native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dancreti]]. The species was named after [[Sanl'jek (zoologist)|zoologist]] who discovered them.

==Biology and appearance==
The creatures had auditory sensors on their upper jaw and had extraordinary hearing that could detect a heartbeat over dozens of [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] away. [[Gender/Legends|Female]] members of the species carried their young in birth pouches for a standard year, after which they would be released.<ref name="CG" /> 

==Behavior==
Sanl'jek lived in large communities of 50 to 100 individuals. Normally docile, a community of sanl'jek would go into a frenzy if one was attacked.<ref name="CG" />
